parameters.query: INSERT INTO businesses (name, setup_completed, setup_stage, setup_draft) VALUES ($1, false, NULL, '{}'::jsonb) RETURNING *

parameters.query: UPDATE businesses SET setup_draft = $1::jsonb, setup_stage = $2 WHERE id = $3

UPDATE businesses SET business_type = $1, business_profile = $2::jsonb, persona_prompt = $3, qualification_rules = $4::jsonb, cta_rules = $5::jsonb, faq = $6::jsonb, objection_handling = $7::jsonb, forbidden_claims = $8::jsonb, escalation_rules = $9::jsonb, setup_completed = true, setup_stage = 'completed', setup_draft = NULL WHERE id = $10

additionalFields.queryParams: ={{ [$('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.business_type, JSON.stringify($('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.business_profile), $('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.persona_prompt, JSON.stringify($('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.qualification_rules), JSON.stringify($('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.cta_rules), JSON.stringify($('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.faq), JSON.stringify($('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.objection_handling), JSON.stringify($('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.forbidden_claims), JSON.stringify($('Stage Engine').first().json.commitData.escalation_rules), $('Stage Engine').first().json.businessId] }}

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM chat_sessions WHERE session_key = $1 LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO chat_sessions (session_key, current_mode, selected_business_id, pending_project_name) VALUES ($1, NULL, NULL, NULL) RETURNING *
UPDATE chat_sessions SET current_mode = 'await_project_name', updated_at = now() WHERE session_key = $1
UPDATE chat_sessions SET current_mode = 'in_setup', selected_business_id = $2, updated_at = now() WHERE session_key = $1
UPDATE chat_sessions SET current_mode = NULL, selected_business_id = NULL, pending_project_name = NULL, updated_at = now() WHERE session_key = $1
